name: codex-broll-finder
description: Codex-native skill and helper workflow for planning, rendering, exporting, and validating b-roll edits.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, render, export, and validate b-roll edits.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native video editing workflow for talking-head b-roll: plan beats, source objective assets, maintain manifests, render cutaways, export social variants, and produce validation reports.
